football.headline: Packers, DT Devonte Wyatt reach 3-year, $57M extension

Reinstated CF Byron Buxton from the reserve list. Optioned SS Tristan Gray to St. Paul (IL).

Agreed to terms with RHPs Jack Slightom, Dalton Hill, Lance Hartley, Dylan Vigue, Taylor Rabe and Grant Fontenot, LHPs Maxx Yehl, Justin LeGuernic, Hunter Possehl and Ethan McElvain, OFs Zion Rose, Tanner Griffith and Dominic Battista and SS Camden Johnson on minor league contracts.

Recalled RHPs Kervin Castro and Elmer Rodríguez from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre (IL). Optioned RHP Jake Bird to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre (IL).

Transferred RHP Will Vest from the 15-day IL to the 60-day IL. Selected the contract of RHP Troy Watson from Toledo (IL). Optioned RHP Troy Watson to Toledo (IL). Sent RHP Jackson Jobe on a rehab assignment to Erie (EL).

Agreed to terms with LHP Matt Krook on a minor league contract. Placed LHP PJ Poulin on the 15-day IL, retroactive to July 16. Transferred LHP Richard Lovelady from the 15-day IL to the 60-day IL. Sent RHP Jake Irvin on rehab assignment to Harrisburg (EL). Sent RHP Trevor Williams on rehab assignments to Wilmington (SAL).
Reinstated RHP Randy Vásquez from the 15-day IL. Reinstated LHP Wandy Peralta from the bereavement list. Designated RHP Ron Marinaccio for assignment. Optioned RHP Jhony Brito to El Paso (PCL).
Optioned RHP Khristian Curtis to Indianapolis (IL).
Sent RHP Dedniel Núñez on a rehab assignment to Syracuse (IL). Sent SS Zack Short outright to Syracuse (IL).
Sent LHP DL Hall on a rehab assignment to Wisconsin.
Recalled 3B Graham Pauley from Jacksonville (IL). Optioned RF Rece Hinds to Jacksonville (IL).
Selected the contract of RHP Elieser Hernández from Gwinnett (IL). Activated RHP Elieser Hernández. Optioned RHP Owen Murphy to Gwinnett.
Sent LHP Connor Prielipp on a rehab assignment to St. Paul (IL).
Placed RHP Stephen Kolek on the 15-day IL.
Designated RHP Nate Pearson for assignment. Recalled 2B Raynel Delgado from Sugar Land (PCL).
Optioned LHP Logan Allen to Columbus (IL).
Transferred RHP Ryan Helsley from the 15-day IL to the 60-day IL. Selected the contract of C Sam Huff from Norfolk (IL). Optioned RHP Cam Sanders to Norfolk (IL).
Sent LHP Blake Snell on a rehab assignment to Oklahoma City (PCL).
Acquired RHP Aaron Civale and cash considerations from the Athletics in exchange for RHP Aiden Moffet.
